# 1. Split the string using a regex that ignores commas inside brackets.
# The split results are mapped and stripped of whitespace.
items = hpath.split(/,(?![^\[]*?\])/).map(&:strip) 

# Initialize storage
no_brackets = []
bracket_groups = {} # Dictionary to store groups, key = content inside []

# Changed variable name to lowercase
bracket_regex = /\[(.*?)\]/ 

items.each do |item|
  # Attempt to match the bracket content
  match = item.match(bracket_regex)

  if match
    # 1. Item contains brackets. Extract the content for the key.
    bracket_content = match[1].strip 
    
    # 2. OMIT THE BRACKETED PART from the item string for cleaner output.
    # We replace the bracketed pattern with an empty string and strip any resulting whitespace.
    clean_item = item.gsub(bracket_regex, '').strip + " ⬜"
    
    # 3. Add the CLEAN item to the corresponding group.
    if bracket_groups.key?(bracket_content)
      bracket_groups[bracket_content] << clean_item
    else
      bracket_groups[bracket_content] = [clean_item]
    end
  else
    # 4. Item does not contain brackets.
    no_brackets << item+" ⬜"
  end
end

# --- 5. Format and Join the Final Output ---

final_output = []

# A. List items without brackets first
final_output << @component_definition.name.upcase + " ⬜"

final_output << no_brackets[1...].join("\n ")

# B. List items grouped by bracket content
bracket_groups.each do |content, items_list|
  # Create a distinct heading for the group
  final_output << "------------------------------\n[\#{content}]"
  # Join the cleaned items
  final_output << items_list.join("\n")
end

# Return the result, joining the separate sections with newlines
final_output.join("\n")"}, {"formula"=>"custom", "x"=>-0.46875, "y"=>-0.4166666666666667, "rotation"=>0, "size"=>"1", "anchor"=>"start-top", "color"=>"#FF0000", "custom_formula"=>"@component_instance"}, {"formula"=>"custom", "x"=>-0.46875, "y"=>0, "rotation"=>0, "size"=>"0.75", "anchor"=>"start", "color"=>"#000000", "custom_formula"=>"@bbox_thickness+" " +@material_name[5..] "}, {"formula"=>"custom", "x"=>-0.46875, "y"=>-0.16666666666666669, "rotation"=>0, "size"=>"0.75", "anchor"=>"start", "color"=>"#000000", "custom_formula"=>"hpath = @component_instance.get_attribute("OpenCutList", "Contents")
